title: Default Dark Mode: Legacy4J
description: A resource pack that gives Legacy4J & Other Legacy4J-related Mods the Default Dark Mode style. Requires the version of Legacy4J that is compatible.
body:
# Default Dark Mode: Legacy4J
(Minecraft 1.20.x-1.21.x, 26.1) [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode-expansion) # About This resource pack is a stand-alone version of **DDM: EXPANSION** that only contains the Legacy4J-related assets and some of the essential minecraft assets! # Compatibility This Resource pack as of v1.2.0 is compatible with **Legacy4J v1.8.7 (latest)**. # Modpacks Default Dark Mode: Legacy4J was originally designed for Re-Console in mind, but any modpack that is built around Legacy4J is welcome to include this resource pack! You have full permission to use this! ---
